title: Creamy Roasted Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Algerian dish featuring roasted lamb in a creamy sauce, perfect for a special occasion or date night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb pieces with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium high heat.
Sear the lamb pieces until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes, then remove from the pan.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped apricots and dates to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, heavy cream, ground cumin, and smoked paprika to the pan, stirring to combine.
Return the lamb pieces to the pan and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the pan with foil and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the tagine for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
